compiled_state.title: [acli-integration]: _ASSIGNEE_NOT_FOUND_ERROR prefix match lacks explanatory comment
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The new constant _ASSIGNEE_NOT_FOUND_ERROR = 'User not found for email:' matches a prefix of the error string. This is intentional (the email value varies), but a comment noting that this is a prefix match would aid future maintainers who might otherwise wonder whether the full string or a regex would be more appropriate.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/acli-integration.py
Category: correctness
